title: Polling completed smoothly across Erode
summary: District administration confirmed peaceful polling across all constituencies with strong voter turnout and minimal disruptions reported.

title: Post-poll cash monitoring continues
summary: Authorities continue strict monitoring of illegal cash movement even after polling, with multiple checks across district borders.

title: Security remains tight after polling
summary: Paramilitary and state police continue security deployment at counting centers and sensitive zones following polling completion.

title: EVMs secured under surveillance
summary: Electronic voting machines have been safely transported and stored in strong rooms under CCTV monitoring and police security.

title: Traffic restrictions eased on NH-948
summary: Heavy vehicle restrictions on the Sathyamangalam–Bannari ghat stretch have been lifted after completion of election logistics.

title: Liquor shops reopen after poll closure
summary: TASMAC outlets and licensed bars resumed operations following the end of election-related restrictions.

title: Jewellery market activity resumes
summary: Trading activity in Erode jewellery market improved as out-of-state traders returned after election checks eased.

title: Police continue crackdown on theft cases
summary: Law enforcement intensified patrols and solved multiple minor theft cases reported in suburban areas.

title: Agricultural trading remains strong
summary: Local regulated markets continue to report steady trading volumes for coconut, copra, and castor.

title: Gold prices show minor recovery
summary: Gold prices in Erode market saw slight upward movement after recent decline amid global market changes.

title: Silver prices remain stable
summary: Silver prices continue to remain steady with minimal fluctuations in local trading.

title: Turmeric prices hold steady

summary: Temperatures remain high across Erode with clear skies and no rainfall expected.
